description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Core that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.11, 3.12), excluding macos-latest with Python 3.6 and 3.7. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and tox, run core system info and Python lint tests (except for Python 3.6), and perform integration tests only on Python 3.11. Send a Slack notification on job failure.
